overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses crosswalks, sidewalks, and an elevated plaza before overlooking a busy highway with heavy traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with yellow crosswalk

events.description: transition from yellow crosswalk to concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow crosswalk and continuing along the city sidewalk

notable_agents.action: character in white jacket with blue markings walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing on dark asphalt
tall dark buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
large illuminated advertising screens with red and blue graphics
tall modern street lamps with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a yellow crosswalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera follows a character walking across the street and onto the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians. Neon billboards and tall skyscrapers dominate the background while streetlights illuminate the steamy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with commercial billboards and building entrances

events.description: approaching intersection with green traffic light, vehicles passing on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and other pedestrians

entered.detail: large blue digital billboard displaying CIRIRUS advertisement with red text
wide concrete staircase leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the concrete sidewalk, the character passes by a large CIRIRUS billboard on the left and building stairs on the right. The street features moderate vehicle traffic and opposing pedestrian flow. The atmosphere remains consistently neon-lit with tall buildings lining both sides of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with stairs leading to upper plaza

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to upper level plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to reach the upper pedestrian plaza

entered.detail: wide grey concrete staircase with multiple steps leading upward
opening at top of stairs leading to elevated pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and climbs a wide set of concrete stairs on the right side of the building. The environment transitions from the open street to a more sheltered, semi-covered space under the building overhang. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and shadow as the character ascends to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with reflective flooring and digital advertising

events.description: entering upper plaza with highly reflective marble floor and large digital screens

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious plaza, passing benches and planters while surrounded by towering digital billboards

entered.detail: glossy dark marble flooring reflecting the neon lights and billboards above
massive illuminated advertising screens displaying various graphics on building facades
large rectangular planters containing tropical plants and trees

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated pedestrian plaza, the scene opens into a wide space with highly reflective marble flooring that mirrors the surrounding neon lights. Large digital billboards cover the surrounding building walls, and planters with greenery line the walkway. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with vibrant neon illumination reflecting off every surface.

events.description: approaching plaza edge to overlook the elevated highway below

agents.ego_description: walking along the plaza edge and looking down at the busy highway traffic below

entered.detail: railing and edge of plaza providing view down to the highway
multi-lane highway with concrete barriers and moving traffic below the plaza level
streams of vehicles with headlights creating light trails on the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character reaching the edge of the elevated plaza, overlooking a busy multi-lane highway below. The camera captures the dense traffic moving along the elevated road, with vehicle headlights creating streaks of light. The surrounding futuristic buildings and neon signs remain visible in the background, maintaining the cyberpunk city atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk city, transitioning from a crowded street level to an expansive elevated plaza. It begins on a yellow crosswalk, following a character as they weave through pedestrians and steamy air beneath towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards. As the character continues along the concrete sidewalk past a large Cirirus advertisement, the scene shifts toward a set of wide stairs that lead away from the traffic and into the sheltered shadows of a building overhang. The camera then emerges onto an elevated pedestrian plaza, where the environment opens into a wide space of reflective marble flooring that mirrors the vibrant digital displays and surrounding greenery. Finally, the movement reaches the edge of the plaza to overlook a busy multi-lane highway, where the dense flow of vehicle headlights creates streaks of light against the backdrop of the futuristic skyline.
